results.title: Sergio Garcia makes bold declaration about LIV Golf future despite funding blow
results.description: Sergio Garcia says he is "very confident" LIV Golf will survive after Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund announced it would withdraw financial support, with the breakaway league now seeking new investors ahead of an uncertain future.

results.title: Charlie Woods secures tournament spot amid dad Tiger's rehab treatment
results.description: Tiger Woods' son Charlie has secured his spot in the U.S. Junior Amateur for a third time, qualifying after a tense 3-for-2 playoff at Heathrow Country Club - a tournament his father famously won three times in a row.

results.title: FIFA likened to The Godfather as Donald Trump called to intervene
results.description: Gianni Infantino has been summoned to appear before US Congress to answer questions about FIFA's alleged ticketing scandal surrounding the 2026 World Cup as the controversy escalates into a full political crisis

results.title: Stanley Cup Final suffers broadcast glitch as announcers fall silent
results.description: The Stanley Cup Final between the Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights got off to a thrilling start on Tuesday, but the opening goal scored by Nikolaj Ehlers was aired without any broadcaster commentary due to a broadcast technical issue

results.title: Spurs still putting emotion of reaching NBA Finals behind them when ‘job isn’t done at all’
results.description: On the eve of the NBA Finals, the Spurs’ superstar center indicated his team was still in the process of refocusing for the next — and final — round against the Knicks.

results.title: Jamal Murray Won't Play for Team Canada in 2028 Olympics in Stunning Decision - Basketball Forever
results.description: Jamal Murray Won't Play for Team Canada in 2028 Olympics in Stunning Decision Basketball Forever
